faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers to help you understand how automation transforms your business.

questions.a: It's replacing manual, repetitive tasks (like booking appointments, sending reminders, or tracking stock) with smart software systems that work 24/7 without human intervention.

questions.q: How long does it take to set up the system?
questions.a: Most projects, like WhatsApp automation or Smart Websites, are delivered and live within 7 to 10 working days.

questions.q: Do I need technical knowledge to use these systems?
questions.a: Not at all. We design everything to be 'Owner-Friendly'. If you can use WhatsApp and a smartphone, you can manage our systems effortlessly.
Absolutely. We use industry-standard encryption and secure platforms like Google Cloud and official Meta APIs for WhatsApp to ensure your data stays 100% private and protected.

questions.q: How much can I actually save with automation?
questions.a: On average, our clients save 15-20 hours of manual work every week and see a significant reduction in 'no-shows'—which directly translates to higher revenue.

questions.q: Do you provide support after the project is live?
questions.a: Yes! We don't just build and leave. We provide ongoing technical support and maintenance packages to ensure your system always runs at peak performance.
